---
title: "About"
page-layout: full
---

# Lorenzo Fabbri

Incoming **Postdoctoral Fellow** at the *[Centro Nacional de Investigaciones Oncológicas (CNIO)](https://www.cnio.es/)*.

## About Me

I am an aspiring cancer epidemiologist with a focus on the environmental and social determinants of cancer. My work combines transparent causal inference methods with evidence triangulation strategies to strengthen causal conclusions in observational epidemiology.
I completed my PhD in Biomedicine at Universitat Pompeu Fabra (2021–2025) within the Childhood and Environment research group at ISGlobal, under the supervision of Prof. Martine Vrijheid.
I am originally from San Marino 🇸🇲 and currently based in Spain 🇪🇸.

## Research Interests

- Cancer epidemiology: environmental and social determinants.
- Causal inference in observational studies.
- Evidence triangulation.

## Education

- **PhD in Biomedicine** (*Universitat Pompeu Fabra, Spain*).

- **M.Sc. in Quantitative and Computational Biology** (*University of Trento, Italy*).

- **B.Sc. in Biotechnology** (*University of Parma, Italy*).

## News & Updates

::: {.news}

**March 2026**
Incoming postdoctoral fellow at CNIO.

:::

## Contact

You can find me on [GitHub](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri), [ORCiD](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3031-322X), [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=QbPv1H0AAAAJ&hl=en&sortby=pubdate), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lorenzo-fabbri-303185383/), and [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/epilorenzo.bsky.social).
